title: Yankee Akuyaku Reijou - Tensei Tenka Yuiga Dokuson
description: Ryuji, the head of the legendary biker gang "Antoinette", is reincarnated in a different world after a motorcycle accident. As... a villainess!!! Ryuji is tangled in the troubles of the life of Elsa, the daughter of the Tsochuarch family, and is about to be executed?!
author: Akashingou Wataru (赤信号わたる)
